prompt: Test the program. If you find a bug, create a failing test (TDD), then fix the bug.
Keep running until all tests pass with no new bugs found in 3 consecutive passes.
Improve load time of the Dashboard feature. Target: under 200ms.
Monitor PR #1234. If you see a new comment or build failure, suggest fixes in pr1234.md.
Watch my team's ADO work items for Project Cosmos updates. Enrich cosmos-status.md daily.
Check if any NuGet dependencies have new versions with security fixes once a day.
Monitor this pull request, if you see a new comment or build failure, suggest fix.
Improve load time of the DataGrid feature. Measure with: dotnet run --project bench/.
Make the API response times faster by profiling and eliminating bottlenecks.
Reduce the published binary size. Measure with du -sh.
Optimize memory usage in the streaming pipeline.
Benchmark the serialization layer and reduce latency.
I need a headless browser that agents can work with that supports SSO websites. Find me a solution.
Create a design.md that solves the distributed locking problem in our worker service.
Explore 5 different approaches to implement real-time notifications and pick the best one.
Find and fix all error handling gaps in the API controllers.
See if you can improve the load time of the login page.
Every weekday morning, check team chat for updates about the release. Enrich release-notes.md.
